sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 150:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 150:1
items.html: Two levels, which are nearly the level of Hochma, and the level of Bina. They are called ZON, for they were extended by two couplings in Malchut of the Rosh that expanded and descended from there to the vessel of Keter of Partzuf SAG. (Inner Light, Item‎ 47)
